decisions.decision: Retry logic uses 100 iterations / 1500ms budget instead of spec's 5 attempts / 2s
3 bugs auto-fixed: anchor overflow, cell numbering (number=0), medium word count
decisions.rationale: Discovered during test suite execution, fixed inline

next_action: Plan phase 12 (ui-&-integration) — full crossword UI with cell selection, clue navigation, hidden input for S Pen, and index.html integration
context_notes: Phase 11 completed cleanly — engine.js (662 lines) generates valid grids for all 3 difficulty tiers with 30/30 tests passing. Phase 12 builds the UI on top of this engine. clues.json (300 pairs) already exists from phase 10. The UI-SPEC.md was created during phase 11 planning and is ready for phase 12.
